evaluators.name: Register two children for an affordable July summer Bible camp morning session
evaluators.description: Checks if the user registered two children ages 7–10 for a July 2025 summer Bible camp morning session under $200/child with pay-at-check-in, preferring the cheapest qualifying camp.

evaluators.name: Set up a $35 monthly donation for Children's Bible Story Kits
evaluators.description: Checks if the user created a monthly donation to the children’s Bible story fund with offline payment, second-lowest suggested amount, and an in-honor-of dedication mentioning Mary.

evaluators.name: Save three Easter crafts for ages 6–8 that take under 30 minutes into a collection
evaluators.description: Checks if the user saved and grouped the top three qualifying Easter crafts for ages 6–8 (≤30 minutes, most downloaded) into a collection named “Easter 6–8 Crafts”.

evaluators.name: Add two Fruit of the Spirit curriculum sets under $25 for different age groups to the cart
evaluators.description: Checks if the cart contains the highest-rated under-$25 Fruit of the Spirit curriculum set for preschool (3–5) and for preteens (9–11).

evaluators.name: Apply for an in-person Sunday morning children’s volunteer role within 10 miles of ZIP 30309
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted a volunteer application for an open in-person children’s role near ZIP 30309 and selected a Sunday morning service time slot.

evaluators.name: Create a four-week April 2025 parables lesson series for ages 5–7
evaluators.description: Checks if the user created an April 2025 lesson series for ages 5–7 with four distinct parable-based lessons and arranged them across weeks 1–4.

evaluators.name: Subscribe to a weekly parent newsletter focused on family devotions for ages 8–10
evaluators.description: Checks if the user created a weekly email-only newsletter subscription with age-specific ideas for ages 8–10 and topics family devotions and helping kids pray.

evaluators.name: Sponsor a child aged 6–9 with a $30–$40 monthly pledge focused on reading and Bible stories
evaluators.description: Checks if the user sponsored the longest-waiting qualifying child (age 6–9, enjoys reading and Bible stories) with a $30–$40 monthly bill-by-mail pledge starting on the first day of next month.
